text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics 🇦🇷 🇮🇱 When the wall has seen more of Milei's face than Argentine pensioners have seen of their money. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics 🇦🇷 🇮🇱 当这堵墙看到的米莱的脸比阿根廷养老金领取者看到的他们的钱还要多时。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 "We, the foreign ministers of the State of Qatar; the State of Kuwait; Kingdom of Saudi Arabia; Arab Republic of Egypt; Federal Republic of Somalia; Republic of the Sudan; State of Libya; People's Republic of Bangladesh; People's Democratic Republic of Algeria; State of Palestine; Republic of Türkiye; Republic of Indonesia; Islamic Republic of Pakistan; Islamic Republic of Mauritania; Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan; and Sultanate of Oman strongly condemn Israel's appointment of a diplomatic envoy to the so- called Somaliland. We consider it a blatant violation of the sovereignty, unity, and territorial integrity of the Federal Republic of Somalia." The messaging from some of these countries is truly schizophrenic. They literally enable Israeli expansion, then cry when Israel actually expands its sphere of influence. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 “我们，卡塔尔国、科威特国、沙特阿拉伯王国、阿拉伯埃及共和国、索马里联邦共和国、苏丹共和国、利比亚国、孟加拉人民共和国、阿尔及利亚民主人民共和国、巴勒斯坦国、土耳其共和国、印度尼西亚共和国、巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国、毛里塔尼亚伊斯兰共和国、约旦哈希姆王国和阿曼苏丹国的外交部长，强烈谴责以色列任命外交特使前往所谓的索马里兰。我们认为这是对索马里联邦共和国主权、统一和领土完整的公然侵犯。” 这些国家中的一些国家所传达的信息确实是精神分裂的。他们实际上促成了以色列的扩张，然后在以色列真正扩大其势力范围时又哭诉。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump says Iran committed a “serious violation” of the ceasefire but insists a peace deal is still coming: “It will happen — the nice way or the hard way.” Source: ABC News
text_zh: 特朗普称伊朗犯下了“严重违规”行为，但坚称和平协议仍将达成：“它会实现的——要么以温和的方式，要么以强硬的方式。” 来源：美国广播公司新闻 (ABC News)

text: 🇺🇦 Former commander of Ukraine's neo-Nazi "Aidar" Battalion, Yevhen Dykyi, has called for lowering the draft age from 25 to 21. "I honestly don't understand why we can't gradually lower the draft age from 25 to 21 — with a guarantee that these young men could only be sent to the front line voluntarily," Dykyi said. He proposed using conscripts aged 21-24 in army logistics and air defense roles in the rear, freeing up older men for frontline deployment further east. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰新纳粹“艾达”营前指挥官叶夫根·迪基呼吁将征兵年龄从25岁降至21岁。“我真的不明白为什么我们不能逐步将征兵年龄从25岁降至21岁——并保证这些年轻人只能自愿被派往一线，”迪基说。他提议让21-24岁的应征入伍者在军队后勤和防空岗位上服役，从而腾出年长者部署到更东部的前线。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Sheikh Muhammad Naji Al-Sumyani, Lebanese-Australian Imam, in a Sydney Friday sermon: "The people must embrace the resistance factions. If the resistance weakens, we will cease to exist." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045823217676235062/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩裔澳大利亚伊玛目谢赫·穆罕默德·纳吉·苏马尼在悉尼周五布道中说：“人民必须拥抱抵抗派系。如果抵抗力量削弱，我们将不复存在。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045823217676235062/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated High quality satellite images show the Feodosiya oil terminal after the April 8 strikes by the Unmanned Systems Forces. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045822682587914746/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：高质量卫星图像显示了无人系统部队在4月8日袭击后的费奥多西亚石油码头。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045822682587914746/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT: "Nuno Felix RT @FRHoffmann1: "12. The atomic age is ending. One age of deterrence, the atomic age, is ending, and a new era of deterrence built on A.I. is set to begin." The tech bros went at it again. Because we get asked a lot. The Technological Republic…" ld applaud those who attempt to build where the market has failed to act. The culture almost snickers at Musk’s interest in grand narrative, as if billionaires ought to simply stay in their lane of enriching themselves . . . . Any curiosity or genuine interest in the value of what he has created is essentially dismissed, or perhaps lurks from beneath a thinly veiled scorn. 17. Silicon Valley must play a role in addressing violent crime. Many politicians across the United States have essentially shrugged when it comes to violent crime, abandoning any serious efforts to address the problem or take on any risk with their constituencies or donors in coming up with solutions and experiments in what should be a desperate bid to save lives. 18. The ruthless exposure of the private lives of public figures drives far too much talent away from government service. The public arena—and the shallow and petty assaults against those who dare to do something other than enrich themselves—has become so unforgiving that the republic is left with a significant roster of ineffectual, empty vessels whose ambition one would forgive if there were any genuine belief structure lurking within. 19. The caution in public life that we unwittingly encourage is corrosive. Those who say nothing wrong often say nothing much at all. 20. The pervasive intolerance of religious belief in certain circles must be resisted. The elite’s intolerance of religious belief is perhaps one of the most telling signs that its political project constitutes a less open intellectual movement than many within it would claim. 21. Some cultures have produced vital advances; others remain dysfunctional and regressive. All cultures are now equal. Criticism and value judgments are forbidden. Yet this new dogma glosses over the fact that certain cultures and indeed subcultures . . . have produced wonders. Others have proven middling, and worse, regressive and harmful. 22. We must resist the shallow temptation of a vacant and hollow pluralism. We, in America and more broadly the West, have for the past half century resisted defining national cultures in the name of inclusivity. But inclusion into what? Excerpts from the #1 New York Times Bestseller The Technological Republic: Hard Power, Soft Belief, and the Future of the West, by Alexander C. Karp & Nicholas W. Zamiska http://www.techrepublicbook.com - Palantir tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT：“Nuno Felix 转推 @FRHoffmann1：“12. 原子时代正在结束。一个威慑时代，即原子时代，正在结束，一个建立在人工智能基础上的新威慑时代即将开始。” 科技兄弟们又开始了。因为我们经常被问到。技术共和国……” 应该赞扬那些试图在市场失灵的地方进行建设的人。这种文化几乎嘲笑马斯克对宏大叙事的兴趣，就好像亿万富翁应该仅仅守住他们致富的本分一样……任何对他的创造价值的好奇或真正的兴趣基本上都被驳回了，或者可能潜伏在薄薄的蔑视之下。 17. 硅谷必须在解决暴力犯罪方面发挥作用。美国各地的许多政客在面对暴力犯罪时基本上耸耸肩，放弃了任何解决问题的认真努力，或者在提出解决方案和实验时不敢承担任何选民或捐赠者的风险，而这本应是拯救生命的绝望尝试。 18. 对公众人物私生活的无情曝光将太多人才赶出了政府服务部门。公共领域——以及对那些敢于做除了致富之外的事情的人的肤浅和琐碎的攻击——已经变得如此无情，以至于共和国只剩下一份无效的、空洞的名单，如果其中潜伏着任何真正的信仰结构，人们或许会原谅他们的野心。 19. 我们无意中鼓励的公共生活中的谨慎是有腐蚀性的。那些不说错话的人往往什么也没说。 20. 必须抵制某些圈子中对宗教信仰的普遍不容忍。精英阶层对宗教信仰的不容忍，也许是其政治项目构成的知识运动不如其内部许多人所声称的那样开放的最明显的迹象之一。 21. 一些文化产生了重要的进步；另一些文化仍然功能失调和倒退。现在所有文化都是平等的。批评和价值判断是被禁止的。然而，这种新的教条掩盖了一个事实，即某些文化甚至亚文化……创造了奇迹。另一些则被证明是平庸的，甚至更糟，是倒退和有害的。 22. 我们必须抵制空洞和虚无的多元主义的肤浅诱惑。在过去半个世纪里，我们美国以及更广泛的西方，以包容的名义抵制定义民族文化。但包容到什么里面？摘自《纽约时报》排名第一的畅销书《技术共和国：硬实力、软信仰与西方的未来》，作者：亚历山大·C·卡普和尼古拉斯·W·扎米斯卡 http://www.techrepublicbook.com - Palantir 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @FRHoffmann1 : "12. The atomic age is ending. One age of deterrence, the atomic age, is ending, and a new era of deterrence built on A.I. is set to begin." The tech bros went at it again. Because we get asked a lot. The Technological Republic, in brief. 1. Silicon Valley owes a moral debt to the country that made its rise possible. The engineering elite of Silicon Valley has an affirmative obligation to participate in the defense of the nation. 2. We must rebel against the tyranny of the apps. Is the iPhone our greatest creative if not crowning achievement as a civilization? The object has changed our lives, but it may also now be limiting and constraining our sense of the possible. 3. Free email is not enough. The decadence of a culture or civilization, and indeed its ruling class, will be forgiven only if that culture is capable of delivering economic growth and security for the public. 4. The limits of soft power, of soaring rhetoric alone, have been exposed. The ability of free and democratic societies to prevail requires something more than moral appeal. It requires hard power, and hard power in this century will be built on software. 5. The question is not whether A.I. weapons will be built; it is who will build them and for what purpose. Our adversaries will not pause to indulge in theatrical debates about the merits of developing technologies with critical military and national security applications. They will proceed. 6. National service should be a universal duty. We should, as a society, seriously consider moving away from an all-volunteer force and only fight the next war if everyone shares in the risk and the cost. 7. If a U.S. Marine asks for a better rifle, we should build it; and the same goes for software. We should as a country be capable of continuing a debate about the appropriateness of military action abroad while remaining unflinching in our commitment to those we have asked to step into harm’s way. 8. Public servants need not be our priests. Any business that compensated its employees in the way that the federal government compensates public servants would struggle to survive. 9. We should show far more grace towards those who have subjected themselves to public life. The eradication of any space for forgiveness—a jettisoning of any tolerance for the complexities and contradictions of the human psyche—may leave us with a cast of characters at the helm we will grow to regret. 10. The psychologization of modern politics is leading us astray. Those who look to the political arena to nourish their soul and sense of self, who rely too heavily on their internal life finding expression in people they may never meet, will be left disappointed. 11. Our society has grown too eager to hasten, and is often gleeful at, the demise of its enemies. The vanquishing of an opponent is a moment to pause, not rejoice. 12. The atomic age is ending. One age of deterrence, the atomic age, is ending, and a new era of deterrence built on A.I. is set to begin. 13. No other country in the history of the world has advanced progressive values more than this one. The United States is far from perfect. But it is easy to forget how much more opportunity exists in this country for those who are not hereditary elites than in any other nation on the planet. 14. American power has made possible an extraordinarily long peace. Too many have forgotten or perhaps take for granted that nearly a century of some version of peace has prevailed in the world without a great power military conflict. At least three generations — billions of people and their children and now grandchildren — have never known a world war. 15. The postwar neutering of Germany and Japan must be undone. The defanging of Germany was an overcorrection for which Europe is now paying a heavy price. A similar and highly theatrical commitment to Japanese pacifism will, if maintained, also threaten to shift the balance of power in Asia. 16. We shou[...]
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @FRHoffmann1：“12. 原子时代正在结束。一个威慑时代，即原子时代，正在结束，一个建立在人工智能基础上的新威慑时代即将开始。” 科技兄弟们又开始了。因为我们经常被问到。简而言之，《技术共和国》。 1. 硅谷对使其崛起成为可能的国家负有道德债务。硅谷的工程精英有义务参与国家的防御。 2. 我们必须反抗应用程序的暴政。iPhone是我们文明中最伟大的创造性成就（如果不是巅峰成就的话）吗？这个物体改变了我们的生活，但它现在也可能正在限制和约束我们对可能性的感知。 3. 免费电子邮件是不够的。一个文化或文明，乃至其统治阶级，只有在能够为公众提供经济增长和安全的情况下，其颓废才会被原谅。 4. 软实力和单纯高谈阔论的局限性已经暴露无遗。自由和民主社会要取得胜利，需要的不仅仅是道德诉求。它需要硬实力，而本世纪的硬实力将建立在软件之上。 5. 问题不在于是否会制造人工智能武器；而在于谁将制造它们以及为了什么目的。我们的对手不会停下来沉溺于关于开发具有关键军事和国家安全应用的技术的优劣的戏剧性辩论。他们会继续前进。 6. 国民服役应该是一项普遍义务。作为一个社会，我们应该认真考虑放弃全志愿兵役制，只有在每个人都分担风险和成本的情况下才进行下一场战争。 7. 如果美国海军陆战队要求更好的步枪，我们应该制造它；软件也是如此。作为一个国家，我们应该有能力继续就海外军事行动的适当性进行辩论，同时坚定不移地致力于我们要求那些置身险境的人。 8. 公务员不需要成为我们的牧师。任何以联邦政府补偿公务员的方式补偿其员工的企业都将难以生存。 9. 我们应该对那些投身公共生活的人表现出更多的宽容。消除任何宽恕的空间——抛弃对人类心理复杂性和矛盾的任何容忍——可能会让我们在掌舵时留下一群我们最终会后悔的角色。 10. 现代政治的心理学化正在把我们引入歧途。那些指望政治领域来滋养他们的灵魂和自我意识，过于依赖在他们可能永远见不到的人身上找到表达的内在生活的人，最终会感到失望。 11. 我们的社会变得太急于加速，并且往往对敌人的灭亡感到幸灾乐祸。战胜对手是一个暂停的时刻，而不是欢庆的时刻。 12. 原子时代正在结束。一个威慑时代，即原子时代，正在结束，一个建立在人工智能基础上的新威慑时代即将开始。 13. 在世界历史上，没有其他国家比这个国家更推进进步价值观。美国远非完美。但很容易忘记，在这个国家，对于那些不是世袭精英的人来说，比地球上任何其他国家都存在更多的机会。 14. 美国的力量使极其漫长的和平成为可能。太多人忘记了，或者可能认为理所当然的是，近一个世纪以来，世界上一直存在某种版本的和平，没有发生大国军事冲突。至少三代人——数十亿人及其子女，现在还有孙辈——从未经历过世界大战。 15. 战后对德国和日本的阉割必须被撤销。对德国的去势是一种矫枉过正，欧洲现在正为此付出沉重的代价。如果维持下去，对日本和平主义的类似且高度戏剧性的承诺也将威胁到改变亚洲的权力平衡。 16. 我们应该[...]

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: Israeli expansionism is not just Türkiye’s problem, nor only the region’s; we are talking about a security issue that has become a global concern, driven by a fundamentalist government there.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：以色列的扩张主义不仅是土耳其的问题，也不仅仅是该地区的问题；我们谈论的是一个已经成为全球关注焦点的安全问题，其背后是由那里一个原教旨主义政府所驱动的。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 Underground Shelters 📝 Saving Iran's military machine Recall that at the start of the war, both Israel and the US actively discussed suppressing Iran's combat potential by nearly 100%. Time, however, showed this was far from the case. Now the US is already saying that the Iranians managed to restore access to 60% of their launch systems. Meanwhile, missile reserves remain at 70%, and strike drones at 40%. 🖍 They achieved this by hiding the IRGC's strategic missile units in underground and mountain military facilities. The coalition blocked the exits and entrances, but the Iranians quickly dug them out. 🚩 So if US intelligence assessments are correct, the overall combat potential of Iran's Armed Forces is far from exhausted. Add to this the recently noted Iranian fighter jets, and the picture looks different. ❗️ This largely explains the negotiating rhetoric of Iran's leadership, which did not sit idle during the ceasefire and restored combat capabilities, preparing just in case for a new round. #Iran #USA ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar 英文频道：📝 地下掩体 📝 拯救伊朗的军事机器 回想战争初期，以色列和美国都曾积极讨论将伊朗的作战潜力压制近 100%。然而，时间证明事实远非如此。现在美国已经表示，伊朗人成功恢复了 60% 发射系统的使用权限。与此同时，导弹储备保持在 70%，攻击型无人机保持在 40%。 🖍 他们通过将伊斯兰革命卫队的战略导弹部队隐藏在地下和山区的军事设施中实现了这一点。联军封锁了出口和入口，但伊朗人很快就将它们挖开了。 🚩 因此，如果美国情报部门的评估是正确的，伊朗武装部队的整体作战潜力远未耗尽。再加上最近发现的伊朗战斗机，情况看起来就不同了。 ❗️ 这在很大程度上解释了伊朗领导层的谈判辞令，他们在停火期间并没有闲着，而是恢复了作战能力，以防万一为新一轮冲突做准备。 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ 俄语 | ✈ 英语 | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 支持我们 原文

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: Everyone knows that Israel’s original aim—depopulating Gaza, whether by killing its people or forcing them to leave—has not changed.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：每个人都知道以色列最初的目标——通过杀害加沙人民或强迫他们离开来使加沙人口减少——并没有改变。

text: Two more oil tankers were forced to turn back in the Strait of Hormuz amid Iran’s ongoing naval blockade. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: 在伊朗持续的海上封锁中，又有两艘油轮被迫在霍尔木兹海峡折返。来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: 🇦🇷 🇮🇱 Argentine President Javier Milei has arrived in Israel for his third official visit, meeting with Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and attending Independence Day celebrations. Milei will become the first foreign head of state to light a torch at Israel's official Independence Day ceremony. He is also set to receive an honorary doctorate from Bar-Ilan University and the Presidential Medal of Honor from Israeli President Isaac Herzog. "I defend Israel and the Jewish people because it is a just cause," Milei said ahead of the visit. "Israel stands as the fortress of the West." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇦🇷 🇮🇱 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱已抵达以色列进行其第三次正式访问，会见了总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡并参加了独立日庆祝活动。米莱将成为第一位在以色列官方独立日庆典上点燃火炬的外国国家元首。他还将获得巴伊兰大学颁发的荣誉博士学位，以及以色列总统艾萨克·赫尔佐格颁发的总统荣誉勋章。“我捍卫以色列和犹太人民，因为这是一项正义的事业，”米莱在访问前表示。“以色列是西方的堡垒。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: IRGC Aerospace Commander Maj. Gen. Seyed Majid Mousavi: During the pause in hostilities, our speed in upgrading and refilling missile and drone launch platforms is even higher than before the war. We have information that the enemy is unable to create such conditions for itself and is forced to bring in munitions drip by drip from the other side of the world.
text_zh: 伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队指挥官赛义德·马吉德·穆萨维少将：在敌对行动暂停期间，我们升级和补充导弹及无人机发射平台的速度甚至比战前还要快。我们掌握的信息显示，敌人无法为自己创造这样的条件，被迫从世界另一端一点一滴地运入弹药。

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: Israel is trying to turn the situation in Lebanon into a fait accompli; this must not be allowed.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：以色列正试图将黎巴嫩局势变成既成事实；绝不能允许这种情况发生。

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: I am optimistic about the extension of the ceasefire.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：我对延长停火协议持乐观态度。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Patrick Lancaster News Today: 📷 📷 Iran War, Port Blockade, Capture of Strait of Hormuz & International Law 📷 📷 📷 On Our new channel PLNewsTodayGlobal Christopher Halali breaks down the escalating Iran war, the growing naval blockade, and the fight over control of the Strait of Hormuz. https://youtu.be/KnKCH6tZ0Mw?si=UX_xgi2ScLrUneDO
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Patrick Lancaster News Today：📷 📷 伊朗战争、港口封锁、霍尔木兹海峡的控制权与国际法 📷 📷 📷 在我们的新频道 PLNewsTodayGlobal 上，克里斯托弗·哈拉利（Christopher Halali）详细分析了不断升级的伊朗战争、日益严峻的海上封锁以及对霍尔木兹海峡控制权的争夺。https://youtu.be/KnKCH6tZ0Mw?si=UX_xgi2ScLrUneDO

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Israel-Cyprus-Greece alliance: This is not only a source of concern for Türkiye. All Muslim countries in the region are seriously worried and asking questions, especially considering Israel’s recent expansionist and aggressive policies in the region. It is not correct to claim that Türkiye is unnecessarily creating concern here. There are realities, there are facts, there are people’s concerns. Türkiye is capable of protecting itself. But there are countries in the region that are weaker in nature and look at this military alliance with concern.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈以色列-塞浦路斯-希腊联盟：这不仅是土耳其担忧的来源。该地区的所有穆斯林国家都深感忧虑并提出质疑，特别是考虑到以色列近期在该地区的扩张主义和侵略性政策。声称土耳其在此无端制造担忧是不正确的。现实存在，事实存在，人们的担忧也存在。土耳其有能力保护自己。但该地区有一些实力较弱的国家，它们正带着担忧审视这一军事联盟。

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: We are not like Israel. They formed a military alliance with Southern Cyprus against Muslim countries in the region. We are not doing what they do; we are looking for ways to extinguish conflicts in our region.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：我们不像以色列。他们为了对抗该地区的穆斯林国家，与南塞浦路斯结成了军事联盟。我们没有做他们所做的事；我们正在寻求消除本地区冲突的方法。

text: 🇺🇸 🤡 📈 📉 Fascinating cartography from the Washington based IMF: Bulgaria and French Guiana qualify as 'developed economies,' but Hungary, the UAE, Saudi Arabia, CHINA — the world's largest economy by PPP and manufacturer of everything IMF's 'developed economies' run on — and the RUSSIAN FEDERATION — the world's largest nuclear power, top space-faring nation, and an economy that has outproduced the entire NATO bloc while under the heaviest sanctions in history — do not. 🐻 These types of "it is known - facts-based" propaganda slops are the reason Westoids can't have nice things or any objective functioning brain thought processes. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🤡 📈 📉 来自华盛顿国际货币基金组织（IMF）的迷人制图：保加利亚和法属圭亚那被列为“发达经济体”，但匈牙利、阿联酋、沙特阿拉伯、中国——按购买力平价计算的世界最大经济体，也是IMF“发达经济体”所依赖的一切产品的制造国——以及俄罗斯联邦——世界最大的核大国、顶尖航天国家，且在史上最严厉制裁下产出超过整个北约集团的经济体——却未被列入。 🐻 这类“众所周知——基于事实”的宣传垃圾，就是西方人无法拥有美好事物或任何客观运作的大脑思维过程的原因。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Behind Trump's confident public posture on the Iran war, the Wall Street Journal reports a president gripped by fear, distraction and no clear exit strategy. When a U.S. jet was shot down over Iran on Good Friday, Trump screamed at aides for hours. Images of Jimmy Carter's failed 1979 hostage rescue were haunting him. Aides kept him out of the Situation Room during the rescue operation because, a senior official said, his impatience wouldn't be helpful. Trump had told his team before the war that Iran would capitulate before closing the Strait of Hormuz, and that even if they tried, the U.S. military could handle it. He was wrong on both counts. He has since marveled at how easily it was shut down, telling aides: "A guy with a drone can shut it down." Notably, as early as late March, before the plane was even shot down, Trump had already ordered his negotiating team to find a way to start talks, according to the WSJ. The public threats and the private reality were moving in opposite directions. The war itself was partly Netanyahu's sell. After a persuasive February briefing from the Israeli Prime Minister in the Situation Room, Trump said he trusted the military to pull it off, pointing to the swift U.S. operation in Venezuela as proof it could work. In Iran, he was shown clips every morning of explosions across Iranian terrain and remarked to advisers how impressive the military was, seemingly in awe of the scale of the bombs. But he had done little to sell the American public on the war, and soon grew frustrated that his administration wasn't getting enough external praise. He resisted ordering the capture of Kharg Island, the launch point for 90% of Iran's oil exports, telling aides the troops would be "sitting ducks." His threat to destroy Iranian civilization was improvised, with no input from his national security team. His Easter morning post telling Iran to "Open the F***in' Strait," which included "Praise be to Allah," was also unilateral. Afterwards he asked aides: "How's it playing?" The two-week ceasefire was announced less than 90 minutes before his own 12-hour ultimatum expired. As the war dragged on and poll numbers dropped, top aides repeatedly urged Trump to stop giving impromptu media interviews, telling him his contradictory statements were only convincing the public he had no coherent strategy. Trump agreed briefly, then resumed. His chief of staff Susie Wiles pushed him to address the nation to reassure the public he had a plan. Trump resisted, asking what he would even say, admitting he couldn't declare victory and didn't know where the war was going. He was eventually persuaded, delivering the April 1st address. It didn't move public opinion. Meanwhile Trump held meetings about the White House ballroom he is building, attended midterm fundraisers hours after the war began, and at a donor reception mused aloud about awarding himself the Medal of Honor, citing as justification a scary landing in Iraq during his first term. His press secretary said he was joking. "We are witnessing astonishing military successes that do not add up to victory," said Kori Schake of the American Enterprise Institute, who served on George W. Bush's National Security Council. "That is squarely on the president and how he's chosen to do his job, lack of attention to detail and lack of planning." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 据《华尔街日报》报道，尽管特朗普在伊朗战争问题上公开表现得信心十足，但私下里他却被恐惧、分心和缺乏明确的退出策略所困扰。当一架美国喷气式飞机在耶稣受难日被伊朗击落时，特朗普对着助手们咆哮了几个小时。吉米·卡特1979年营救人质失败的画面一直萦绕在他心头。在救援行动期间，助手们将他挡在战情室之外，因为一位高级官员说，他的急躁无济于事。特朗普在战争前曾告诉他的团队，伊朗会在霍尔木兹海峡关闭前投降，即使他们试图关闭，美军也能应付。他在两点上都错了。此后，他对海峡被关闭得如此轻易感到惊奇，并告诉助手：“一个拿着无人机的人就能把它关掉。”值得注意的是，据《华尔街日报》报道，早在3月下旬，即飞机被击落之前，特朗普就已经命令他的谈判团队寻找开启谈判的方法。公开的威胁与私下的现实正背道而驰。这场战争在一定程度上是内塔尼亚胡推销的结果。在以色列总理于2月在战情室进行了一次有说服力的简报后，特朗普表示他相信军方能成功，并指出美国在委内瑞拉的迅速行动证明了它是可行的。在伊朗问题上，他每天早上都会观看伊朗境内爆炸的片段，并向顾问们感叹军队是多么令人印象深刻，似乎对炸弹的规模感到敬畏。但他几乎没有做任何工作来向美国公众推销这场战争，很快就因为他的政府没有得到足够的外部赞扬而感到沮丧。他拒绝下令占领伊朗90%石油出口的出发点哈尔克岛，告诉助手部队会成为“活靶子”。他威胁要摧毁伊朗文明是即兴发挥的，没有征求国家安全团队的意见。他在复活节早晨发布的帖子，要求伊朗“打开该死的海峡”，并包含“赞美真主”，也是单方面决定的。事后他问助手：“反响如何？”为期两周的停火协议是在他自己设定的12小时最后通牒到期前不到90分钟宣布的。随着战争的拖延和民调数字的下降，高级助手们一再敦促特朗普停止接受即兴的媒体采访，告诉他自相矛盾的言论只会让公众相信他没有连贯的策略。特朗普短暂同意，随后又恢复了原样。他的幕僚长苏西·怀尔斯敦促他向全国发表讲话，以向公众保证他有计划。特朗普拒绝了，问他能说什么，并承认他无法宣布胜利，也不知道战争将走向何方。他最终被说服，发表了4月1日的演讲。但这并没有改变公众舆论。与此同时，特朗普还就他正在建造的白宫宴会厅举行了会议，在战争开始几小时后参加了中期选举筹款活动，并在一次捐赠者招待会上大声思考给自己颁发荣誉勋章，理由是他第一任期内在伊拉克的一次惊险着陆。他的新闻秘书说他在开玩笑。“我们正在目睹令人震惊的军事成功，但这些成功并没有转化为胜利，”曾在乔治·W·布什国家安全委员会任职的美国企业研究所的科里·沙克说。“这完全归咎于总统以及他选择如何工作，即缺乏对细节的关注和缺乏规划。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarTranslated Amid US easing sanctions on Russian oil, Zelensky says multibillion profits from its sale directly turn into Russian strikes on Ukraine. He says Russia launched over 2360 drones, more than 1320 aerial bombs and nearly 60 missiles this week. US has extended the waiver allowing countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil until May 16, Reuters reports. https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 在美国放宽对俄罗斯石油制裁之际，泽连斯基表示，出售石油获得的数十亿美元利润直接转化为了俄罗斯对乌克兰的袭击。他表示，本周俄罗斯发射了超过 2360 架无人机、1320 多枚航空炸弹和近 60 枚导弹。据路透社报道，美国已将允许各国购买受制裁俄罗斯石油的豁免期延长至 5 月 16 日。https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @20committee : The ROK is an actual ally. Seoul gives as well as takes. South Korea committed over 300K troops to America's Vietnam War, where they suffered over 5K KIA. Remind us how many troops the IDF has committed to any and all US wars since 1948. How do people with a straight face say that Israel get "military aid" but South Korea doesn't, simply bc one is officially in the foreign aid budget, and one is buried in the military budget. The US has over 20K soldiers stationed in South Korea, there as a tripwire in case the North attacks. This costs *FAR* more than military aid to Israel, and also puts thousands of American soldiers directly in harm's way. - David Bernstein tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @20committee：韩国是一个真正的盟友。首尔有付出也有回报。韩国曾向美国的越南战争派遣了超过 30 万名士兵，其中 5000 多人阵亡。提醒一下，自 1948 年以来，以色列国防军（IDF）向美国参与的任何及所有战争派遣了多少军队。人们怎么能一本正经地说以色列获得了“军事援助”而韩国没有，仅仅因为前者被正式列入对外援助预算，而后者被隐藏在军事预算中。美国在韩国驻扎了超过 2 万名士兵，作为一旦朝鲜发动袭击时的绊脚石。这比对以色列的军事援助成本要高得多，而且还让数千名美国士兵直接处于危险之中。 - David Bernstein 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @noclador : This is very interesting and explains a lot: 🇬🇧 British Armed Forces: 50,000+ civil employees 🇮🇹 Italian Armed Forces: 16,257 civil employees And Italy fields 30,000 more troops than the UK. This explains were a part of the British Armed Forces' budget is being wasted. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @noclador：这非常有趣，解释了很多问题：🇬🇧 英国武装部队：50,000 多名文职雇员 🇮🇹 意大利武装部队：16,257 名文职雇员，而且意大利的兵力比英国多 30,000 人。这解释了英国武装部队预算的一部分浪费在哪里了。推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 Neoconomist attempt at a propaganda dis backfires spectacularly - using the usual tropes and again confusing the Islamic Republic with US Islamic colonies/puppet regimes, like Saudi Arabia and UAE. ... "Mr Trump is portrayed as a vain, cowardly liar who declares victory even as his pants are, literally, on fire. Pete Hegseth, America’s secretary of war, is shown as a vomiting drunk with crusader tattoos." "America’s State Department used to have an office that counteracted enemy propaganda, but the Trump administration closed it last year. So the world’s greatest military power is struggling to subdue a regional bully, and the world’s cultural superpower is being out-trolled by a regime that whips women for showing their hair. For the man who let this happen, “loser” seems like an understatement." 🐻 The Neoconomist can't seem to make up thier mind on how to call the US regime... "Joyless regime" or "murderous dictatorship"? 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 《新经济学家》试图进行宣传反击，结果却适得其反——他们使用了惯用的比喻，再次将伊朗伊斯兰共和国与沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋等美国伊斯兰殖民地/傀儡政权混为一谈。……“特朗普先生被描绘成一个虚荣、懦弱的骗子，即使裤子真的着火了，他也要宣称胜利。美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯被描绘成一个呕吐的醉汉，身上还有十字军纹身。”“美国国务院曾经有一个办公室专门反击敌对宣传，但特朗普政府去年关闭了它。因此，世界上最强大的军事力量正在努力制服一个地区恶霸，而这个世界文化超级大国正在被一个因女性露发而鞭打她们的政权在舆论战中击败。对于让这一切发生的人来说，‘失败者’这个词似乎都显得轻描淡写了。”🐻 《新经济学家》似乎无法决定该如何称呼美国政权……是“毫无乐趣的政权”还是“残暴的独裁政权”？🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Massive U.S.–Israeli strikes hitting hospitals in Iran, forcing staff to evacuate newborns during the active phase of the war. One hospital staff was seen carrying babies to safety.
text_zh: 美以联军对伊朗境内的医院发动大规模袭击，迫使医护人员在战争激烈阶段撤离新生儿。有人看到一名医院工作人员抱着婴儿撤离到安全地带。

text: IRGC officer on hitting American F-35 jet: God made this happen, God did it, and we just pressed a button and God showed us the result. We have learned to say "And you threw not, when you threw, but it was Allah who threw". The work we do is actually done by God, and what we fire, God fires. When we saw it hit, God hit it.
text_zh: 伊斯兰革命卫队军官谈及击中美国F-35战机：是真主让这一切发生，是真主所为，我们只是按下了按钮，而真主向我们展示了结果。我们学会了说“当你投掷时，并非你投掷，而是真主投掷”。我们所做的工作实际上是由真主完成的，我们发射的武器，是由真主发射的。当我们看到它击中目标时，是真主击中了它。

text: 🇺🇸 🇯🇴 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 Satellite imagery shows that the U.S. has relocated its THAAD and Patriot launchers in Jordan to be less exposed. 🐻 World Wildlife Foundation is about to start monitoring them on their "extremely endangered" list, as 4 out of 8 in existence were already disabled. These images show 25% of the existent operational THAAD systems globally. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇯🇴 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 卫星图像显示，美国已将其部署在约旦的“萨德”（THAAD）和“爱国者”导弹发射装置重新安置，以降低其暴露风险。🐻 世界自然基金会（WWF）即将把它们列入“极度濒危”名单进行监测，因为现存的8套系统中已有4套瘫痪。这些图像展示了全球现存可操作“萨德”系统总数的25%。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel REPORT FROM IRAN: Iran’s security apparatus is bracing for a potential surprise strike by the U.S. and Israel in the near term. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 来自伊朗的报告：伊朗安全机构正为近期可能遭受美国和以色列的突然袭击做准备。推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran's president says that Trump does not have the justification to deprive Iran of its 'nuclear rights'. tweet
text_zh: 旁观者指数 伊朗总统表示，特朗普没有理由剥夺伊朗的“核权利”。推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : Ibrahim Saqr, prominent Lebanese Christian activist: "90% of Lebanese were quietly praying there wouldn't be a ceasefire, so they could get rid of Hezbollah." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045599040776130943/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转发 @Osint613：黎巴嫩著名基督教活动家易卜拉欣·萨克尔（Ibrahim Saqr）：“90%的黎巴嫩人都在默默祈祷不要停火，这样他们就能摆脱真主党。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045599040776130943/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian senior Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf who has been negotiating with the U.S.: “Martyrdom is the only true success for me. I am prepared to give both my life and my reputation so people can secure their rights.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045792239415185788/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一直在与美国进行谈判的伊朗高级官员穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）：“殉道是我唯一真正的成功。我准备献出我的生命和名誉，以便人民能够获得他们的权利。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045792239415185788/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian reporter on Larak Island in the Strait of Hormuz, the Islamic regime toll booth: “That vessel behind me is awaiting permission from the IRGC” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045791760274571320/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗记者在霍尔木兹海峡的拉拉克岛（Larak Island），即伊斯兰政权的收费站报道：“我身后的那艘船正在等待伊斯兰革命卫队的许可” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045791760274571320/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese sources told Asharq Al-Awsat that a meeting between Netanyahu and Lebanon’s president is not on the agenda. According to President Trump, both were supposed to meet. This can obviously change. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045791026757927139/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩消息人士告诉《中东报》（Asharq Al-Awsat），内塔尼亚胡与黎巴嫩总统的会晤不在议程上。据特朗普总统称，两人本应会面。这显然可能会改变。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045791026757927139/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Over 500 million barrels of crude have been pulled from global supply since the war began, the largest energy disruption in modern history. That’s approximately $45 billion dollars. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045790243102642524/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 自战争开始以来，全球供应已减少超过5亿桶原油，这是现代史上最大的能源中断。这大约价值450亿美元。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045790243102642524/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Pre-ceasefire strikes hits Hezbollah hard In the 24 hours before the ceasefire took effect, the IDF struck hundreds of targets across Lebanon, eliminating 150+ Hezbollah operatives and hitting about 300 sites, including launchers, command centers, and weapons depots. Among those killed was Bint Jbeil sector commander Ali Rida Abbas, a key frontline figure who led attacks against IDF forces and helped rebuild Hezbollah’s presence in the sector. Abbas is the 4th Bint Jbeil sector commander eliminated since Operation Northern Arrows. Total toll from Operation Roaring Lion now exceeds 1,800 Hezbollah operatives killed. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军：停火前的打击重创真主党。在停火生效前的24小时内，以色列国防军打击了黎巴嫩各地的数百个目标，消灭了150多名真主党武装人员，并击中了约300个地点，包括发射装置、指挥中心和武器库。在被击毙的人员中，包括宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）地区指挥官阿里·里达·阿巴斯（Ali Rida Abbas），他是领导针对以色列国防军部队袭击并帮助重建真主党在该地区存在感的核心前线人物。阿巴斯是自“北方之箭”行动以来被消灭的第4位宾特朱拜勒地区指挥官。“咆哮雄狮”行动造成的真主党武装人员死亡总数现已超过1800人。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @polidemitolog : EU Defense Commissioner Andrius Kubilius proposed signing a new intergovernmental European treaty to create a genuine defense union that would prepare the bloc for independent protection and include Ukraine, Britain, and Norway, according to Euractiv. He questioned whether current EU treaties are sufficient and suggested modeling it after the Schengen agreement. President of the European Commission Ursula von der Leyen first raised the idea at the start of her second term, together with plans to increase defense spending and coordination. tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix） 转发 @polidemitolog：据欧洲动态（Euractiv）报道，欧盟国防专员安德留斯·库比柳斯（Andrius Kubilius）提议签署一项新的政府间欧洲条约，以建立一个真正的国防联盟，使欧盟能够进行独立保护，并包括乌克兰、英国和挪威。他质疑现有的欧盟条约是否足够，并建议以申根协定为蓝本。欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩（Ursula von der Leyen）在第二个任期开始时首次提出了这一想法，并计划增加国防开支和协调。推文

text: Nuno Felix The current Spanish government is a crime Syndicate Spain’s proactive foreign policy - anti-Trumpian, pro-European and pro-migration - is affecting domestic politics in Ireland and many more countries: Government and civil servants uneasy over President’s choice of first overseas trip – The Irish Times https://www.irishtimes.com/politics/2026/04/18/government-and-civil-servants-uneasy-over-presidents-choice-of-first-overseas-trip/ - Alberto Alemanno 🇪🇺 tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix） 现任西班牙政府是一个犯罪集团。西班牙积极主动的外交政策——反特朗普、亲欧洲和亲移民——正在影响爱尔兰及更多国家的国内政治：政府和公务员对总统选择首次海外访问目的地感到不安——《爱尔兰时报》 https://www.irishtimes.com/politics/2026/04/18/government-and-civil-servants-uneasy-over-presidents-choice-of-first-overseas-trip/ - 阿尔贝托·阿莱曼诺（Alberto Alemanno） 🇪🇺 推文
